creator: bstalnaker@queensboro.com
text:
When installing PC-BSD 10 on a dell Optiplex 740 and after setting up all network changes I can connect to non-secure websites using my browser but can not connect using https. There is no proxy on secure traffic only non-secure. Also I can wget a https:// site I'm assuming because it uses a different port to go out on but I'm not sure. ANy help would be appreciated

How-To-Repeat: Install PC-BSD 10 and access https website.
